label: Best absolute growth
blurb: Total price return since the company first listed — split & dividend adjusted. The all-time moonshots.

label: Best annual growth
blurb: Compound annual growth rate of the share price since listing — fairer across eras than raw total growth.

label: Best total return
blurb: Total shareholder return (price appreciation + reinvested dividends), annualised. The truest 'best stock' measure.

label: Most cumulative dividends
blurb: Total dividends paid per share over the company's lifetime — the great long-run income compounders.

label: Best average dividend
blurb: Average dividend yield across the company's history.

label: Highest current dividend
blurb: Today's dividend yield — what an income investor would collect now.

label: Dividend aristocrats
blurb: Consecutive years of rising dividends. 25+ = Aristocrat, 50+ = King.

label: Most undervalued
blurb: Cheapest by a blend of P/E, P/B, P/S, EV/EBITDA & PEG. Low score = bargain (screen, not advice).

label: Most overvalued
blurb: Richest by the same blend — priced for perfection. High score = expensive.

label: Highest quality
blurb: Best businesses by return on capital, margins and consistency.

label: Best risk-adjusted
blurb: Highest return per unit of volatility (Sharpe ratio) — the 'sleep at night' winners.

label: Wealth creators
blurb: Total shareholder wealth created over the company's life (Bessembinder-style).

label: What's hot now
blurb: Trailing 12-month total return — this year's momentum.

label: Hall of shame
blurb: The biggest value destroyers in the universe — worst long-run returns.
